description: This satellite image shows a false-colour infrared view of a landscape identified as a "Hydrophilous tall herb example" within the Rečice Natura 2000 site in Croatia, captured on 2011-08-25 by SPOT-5 at 2.5 m resolution. The image displays a winding river in the upper half, appearing dark blue, with vibrant red areas along its banks and within oxbows, indicating dense hydrophilous vegetation or waterlogged areas highly reflective in the infrared spectrum, consistent with alluvial meadows. Surrounding these features are numerous rectangular and irregularly shaped plots in shades of red, pink, and light brown/grey, characteristic of agricultural land or different vegetation types. A straight, dark grey/blue linear feature, likely a road or railway, horizontally traverses the lower middle section of the image. The image source is CNES 2012©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
